info.name: Hospitality Platform — Gateway API
info.description:
Calls the **gateway** only (inventory + reservations).

**Setup:** import the example environment, set `baseUrl` and `access_token` (Auth0 access token with your API `aud` and claim **`https://hospitality.app/claims/enterprise_id`** — PLG demo: `eeeeeeee-eeee-4eee-8eee-eeeeeeeeeeee`). Staff also need a row in **`inventory.staff_member`** keyed by JWT **`sub`** (see **`docs/AUTHORIZATION.md`**). Run **GET List hotels** then **GET Room types** so **collection** variables `hotel_id` / `room_type_id` fill in.

**Multi-brand (0017–0018):** optional **`chain_code`** collection var (e.g. **`HBR`**) — collection pre-request adds **`x-chain-code`** on every request when set. Public catalog: **GET List enterprises** / **GET Enterprise chains** (no auth). Authenticated: **GET My chains**, optional **`chain_id`** on **GET List reservations**. Managers: **01 — Admin staff** folder (**`staff:admin`**).

**Phase 4 inventory:** **GET Search stays**, **GET Room type calendar**. Optional **`rate_plan_code`** / **`promotion_code`** (DEMO **LOS3**, **SAVE5**).

**Phase 5:** soft holds (**0015**); **GET Reservation** saves **`reservation_etag`** for **`If-Match`** on **PATCH**.

**Phase 6:** **`cancellation_reason`** on cancel; reservation notes (**0016**). Claim **`https://hospitality.app/claims/roles`**: `guest`, `front_desk`, `manager`, `read_only`, `integration`. Legacy tokens with **`chain_id`** only still work when **`enterprise_id`** is absent.

**Variables:** environment overrides collection for the same name — example env only defines `baseUrl`, `access_token`, `check_in`, `check_out`.

**Conventions:** folders by domain; Bearer on protected folders; **00 — Public** uses `noauth`. Reservation flow: **Create** → **GET** → **Guest** → **Notes** → **Confirm** → **Cancel**.

variable.description: Optional; e.g. DEMO **LOS3** (use with3+ nights). Empty = omit meaningfully in query/body.
Optional; e.g. DEMO **SAVE5**. Empty = BAR / no promo.
Optional comma-separated hotel UUIDs for **GET Search stays**. Leave blank to search all hotels in the chain.
Half-open range start for **GET Room type calendar** (YYYY-MM-DD).
Set by **POST Create soft hold** test script (migration **0015**).
Weak ETag from **GET Reservation** / **POST Create**; optional **If-Match** on PATCH (**FR-R11**).
Optional on **PATCH Cancel**: guest_request | no_show | duplicate | rate_dispute | other (**FR-R9**).
Active brand code; collection pre-request sends **x-chain-code** when non-empty. Clear for enterprise-wide staff calls.
Enterprise catalog code (Palladium Lodging Group demo).
Optional brand UUID filter on **GET List reservations**; **GET My chains** may set first chain id.
Set by **POST Create staff member** or manually for admin PATCH/PUT.
Brand UUID for **01c — Admin catalog** (DEMO). **GET My chains** may overwrite **chain_id**.
Set by **POST Create room type (admin)** or manually.

item.name: 00 — Public

request.description: No `Authorization` header. Confirms gateway is reachable.
Public catalog (**0017**). No Bearer required.
Single enterprise by code (e.g. **PLG**). No auth.
Brands under an enterprise (DEMO, HBR, NWE, VCB for PLG). No auth.
All brands (legacy public catalog).
Single brand metadata by code (uses **`chain_code`** var, default **HBR**).

**Phase 10A:** Anonymous booking on brand **DEMO** with promo **SAVE5** (500 bps off). Requires migrations **0014** + **0020**. Compare **`pricing.discount_cents`** / **`total_cents`** vs the same search without **`promotion_code`**. SPA: promo field on **`/c/DEMO`**.

**Phase 10A:** **LOS3** rate plan on **DEMO** — use **`check_in`** / **`check_out`** spanning **3+ nights** (default collection dates are 3 nights). Echo **`pricing.rate_plan_code`** through availability + **POST Create reservation**.

item.description: Unauthenticated smoke checks and public catalog. **Guest promo demo (10A):** last two requests use **`x-chain-code: DEMO`** + **`SAVE5`** / **`LOS3`**.

item.name: 01 — Inventory

request.description: Brands the caller may access (gateway-resolved from JWT **`enterprise_id`** + **`inventory.staff_member`** grants). Guests see all enterprise brands. On **200**, saves first **`chain_id`** when present.

Returns `hotels[]` for allowed brand scope. With **`chain_code`** set, filters to that active brand via **`x-chain-code`**. On **200**, saves first hotel `id` to **collection** and **active environment**.
Single hotel for the token’s chain. **404** if id not in chain.
`room_types[]` for this hotel. On **200**, saves first type `id` to `room_type_id`. Run after **GET List hotels** (or set `hotel_id` manually).

Per-night **bookable** + **pricing** (rate plans, optional promotions, **inventory blocks**, hotel **booking policies**). Optional query **`rate_plan_code`** / **`promotion_code`** (collection vars; leave empty to skip). Dates should match **POST /v1/reservations**. Requires migration **0014**.

**FR-V1:** all room types in the chain (optionally filter **`hotel_ids`** = comma-separated UUIDs in **`search_hotel_ids`**). Hotels that fail policy checks for the stay are omitted. **`sort`**: `price` (here) or change URL to `sort=bookable`. Optional **`rate_plan_code`** / **`promotion_code`**.

**FR-V2:** per-day **occupancy**, **soft_hold_units**, **units_blocked**, **remaining_units**, **bookable** on half-open **[from, to)**. Set **`calendar_from`** / **`calendar_to`** on the collection (e.g. one month). **0015** adds **soft holds** to counts.
**FR-V5:** temporary capacity lock (**60**–**86400** s TTL). Re-run **GET …/availability** to see **`max_night_including_holds`** / **`bookable`**. Saves **`soft_hold_id`** on **200**.
Removes hold for this chain. Set **`soft_hold_id`** from **POST Create soft hold**.

item.description: Bearer token required; gateway resolves enterprise scope and injects **`x-chain-id`** / **`x-chain-ids`**. Optional **`chain_code`** → **`x-chain-code`** (collection pre-request).

item.name: 01 — Admin staff

request.description: List provisioned staff for the token **`enterprise_id`**. Requires **manager** role (**`staff:admin`**). Clear **`chain_code`** if you want enterprise-wide admin context.

Provision staff (**manager** only). Set **`auth0_sub`** to the user's JWT **`sub`**. Either **`all_chains`: true** or non-empty **`chain_ids`** (Harborline demo UUID shown). Saves **`staff_member_id`** on **201**.
Partial update: **`email`**, **`display_name`**, **`active`**, **`all_chains`**. Requires **`staff_member_id`**.
Replace **`staff_chain_grant`** rows. Staff must have **`all_chains`: false**; use **PATCH** to set **`all_chains`: true** for corporate access.

**Phase 9B:** Create pending staff + invite token. Response includes **`invite.accept_url`** (copy to browser; set **`INVITE_BASE_URL`** on inventory for absolute SPA links). Saves **`invite_accept_url`** on **201**.

item.description: Manager-only staff provisioning (**0018** / **0019** invite). Token needs **`manager`** role. **POST …/invite** is the preferred path (no manual **`auth0_sub`**). See **`docs/AUTHORIZATION.md`**.

item.name: 01b — Accept staff invite

request.description: Bearer must be the **invited user's** login (email must match invite). Set **`invite_token`** from the `token=` query param in **`invite_accept_url`**, or open the SPA **`/invite/accept?token=…`** link. Re-login after **200** so the Auth0 Action refreshes JWT claims.

item.description: **Phase 9B:** Link **`auth0_sub`** after invite. Works without brand scope on the token (**guest** role is enough).

item.name: 01c — Admin catalog

request.description: **Phase 9F:** Create brand in token enterprise. Requires **manager** + **`staff:admin`**. Change **`code`** if **409**.
Partial update: **`name`**, **`code`**, **`default_currency`**.
**Phase 10C:** Hotels for a brand. Requires **manager** + **`staff:admin`**. Clear **`chain_code`** for enterprise-wide admin context, or set **`admin_chain_id`** (DEMO UUID default).
Create hotel under **`admin_chain_id`**. Change **`code`** if **409** (already exists). Saves **`hotel_id`** on **201**.
Admin hotel detail including booking policy fields.
Partial update: **`name`**, **`code`**, **`booking_min_los`**, **`booking_max_los`**, **`booking_timezone`**, CTA/CTD DOW arrays, **`booking_same_day_cutoff_time`**.
Room types for **`hotel_id`** with commercial fields (**`base_rate_cents`**, tax, fees).
Create room type. Appears in public search after gateway cache TTL (~60s). Saves **`admin_room_type_id`** + **`room_type_id`** on **201**.
Update BAR, units, tax, fees, or display fields. Use **`admin_room_type_id`** or **`room_type_id`**.
**Phase 10D:** List rate plans for brand **`admin_chain_id`**.
Create rate plan. Follow with **PUT LOS tiers** when using tiered pricing.
Replace LOS tiers for a plan. Set **`admin_rate_plan_id`** from create response.
**Phase 10D:** List promotions for brand.
Create promo. Test on guest search with **`promotion_code`**.
**Phase 10E:** Inventory blocks for room type.
Reduce sellable units on **[start_date, end_date)** nights.
Remove inventory block. Set **`admin_block_id`** from create response.

item.description: **Phase 10C–10E:** Manager catalog, rates, promos, and blocks. Token needs **manager** + **`staff:admin`**. Target brand via **`admin_chain_id`**; ids from create responses or **01 — Inventory** list calls.

item.name: 02 — Reservations

request.description: Newest first across allowed brands (enterprise staff) or email-scoped (guest). Optional filters (**FR-R8**): **`status`**, **`hotel_id`**, **`chain_id`** (brand UUID — add `&chain_id={{chain_id}}` when **`chain_id`** is set), **`stay_from`** + **`stay_to`**. Response includes `has_more`. No embedded `guest` rows.

exec: // Resolved value: environment wins over collection. Generate only when blank.

header.description: Resolved from environment or collection; pre-request generates a GUID into **collection** when blank. Clear `idempotency_key` (collection or env) for a new booking; keep the same value to replay (**200**).

request.description: First send sets **`reservation_id`** on the **collection** (use **Collection** → **Variables** to inspect). For a **new** booking, clear **`idempotency_key`**; pre-request fills a new GUID on the collection when resolved value is blank. Re-send **without** clearing to test replay (**200** + `idempotent_replay: true`). Optional **`rate_plan_code`** / **`promotion_code`** must match **GET …/availability** for the same stay (or omit / leave collection vars empty). Pricing snapshot + **`expected_total_cents`** parity: migration **0013**+.
Uses `{{reservation_id}}` (Postman: **environment** overrides **collection** for the same name). Saves **`reservation_etag`** from **`ETag`** for optional **PATCH** concurrency (**FR-R11**).

header.description: Optional; from **GET Reservation** / **POST Create**. Omit by clearing **`reservation_etag`** or disable header.

request.description: At least one of `first_name`, `last_name`, `email`, `phone`. Set `"phone": null` to clear phone. Optional **`If-Match`** (**412** if stale).

header.description: Optional weak ETag for optimistic concurrency.

request.description: At least one of **`internal_note`**, **`guest_note`**. Run **before Cancel** in the happy path. **`internal_note`** requires **manager** when **`https://hospitality.app/claims/roles`** is present on the token.

header.description: Optional weak ETag for optimistic concurrency.

request.description: `pending` → `confirmed`. Duplicate **PATCH** with same status is a no-op (**200**). After confirm, only `{"status":"cancelled"}` is valid.

header.description: Optional weak ETag for optimistic concurrency.

request.description: Valid from **pending** or **confirmed**. Optional **`cancellation_reason`** (collection var); server sets **`cancelled_at`**. Requires **manager** role when token includes **`roles`** claim. From **cancelled**, further changes return **409**.

item.description: Bearer + `Idempotency-Key` on creates. Optional **`chain_code`** → **`x-chain-code`** for active brand on writes. Suggested flow: **Create** → **GET** → **Guest** → **Notes** → **Confirm** → **Cancel**. Dates are **YYYY-MM-DD**; `check_out` must be after `check_in`.
